Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given several tables and we need to produce an event log for process mining Steps 1 We will use order_id as the case identifier

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We will derive events from each table Orders Table Order Created Order Lines Table For each item we can have an Item Picked event Delivery Table We have two events per delivery Order Dispatched and Order Arrived Invoice Table Invoice Issued for each invoice Payments Table Payment Received for each payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We have two options a Create one event per item pick with the same activity name but different timestamps and possibly different resources b Aggregate all item picks for an order into one event using the latest or earliest time

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Since the problem says produce one event per activity if it is meaningful or summarize if appropriate and we have individual timestamps and picker_id for each item it is meaningful to have one event per item pick

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that an order can have multiple deliveries like order 1002 We will create two events for each delivery row one for dispatch and one for arrival

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will map timestamps from the respective tables We will combine the data by order_id and sort by timestamp

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We will include resources actors where available For Order Created We have sales_person_id For Item Picked We have picker_id For Order Dispatched and Order Arrived We have carrier_id For Invoice Issued We have billing_person_id For Payment Received we do not have a direct resource

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We do not have a direct resource for payment so we can leave it blank or use payment method as an attribute We will leave as blank

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will also include other attributes if available For example for Item Picked we can include item_id and quantity However note that the event log should have a consistent structure We will have at least Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor and Other Attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 1 Order Created Case ID order_id Activity Name Order Created Timestamp order_date Resource sales_person_id Other Attributes customer_id customer_type order_priority

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 2 Item Picked for each item in Order Lines Case ID order_id Activity Name Item Picked Timestamp item_picking_date Resource picker_id Other Attributes item_id quantity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 3 Order Dispatched for each delivery Case ID order_id Activity Name Order Dispatched Timestamp delivery_dispatch_date Resource carrier_id Other Attributes delivery_id carrier_id delivery_note Event 4 Order Arrived for each delivery Case ID order_id Activity Name Order Arrived Timestamp delivery_arrival_date Resource carrier_id Other Attributes delivery_id carrier_id delivery_note

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 5 Invoice Issued for each invoice Case ID order_id Activity Name Invoice Issued Timestamp invoice_issue_date Resource billing_person_id Other Attributes invoice_id invoice_amount

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 6 Payment Received for each payment Case ID order_id we get this via the invoice_id but note that the Payments table has invoice_id and the Invoice table has order_id We will need to join Payments with Invoice to get the order_id Activity Name Payment Received Timestamp payment_date Other Attributes payment_id payment_method payment_reference invoice_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that the Payments table is linked to Invoice so we need to get the order_id for each payment via the Invoice table

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We will create a list of dictionaries for events We will do the same for the other events

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can include the resource_id as is or map to the name Since the Resources table is provided we can map the resource_id to the resource_name for readability

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets assume we want the resource_name We will map if available

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Initialize an empty list for events For each order in Orders create an event For each order line in OrderLines create an event For each delivery in Delivery create two events For each invoice in Invoice create an event For each payment in Payments look up the invoice to get the order_id and create an event Then sort the events by order_id and timestamp

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For Other Attributes we can include a string of key value pairs We will include them as a string in the format key1 value1 key2 value2
